_opus_classification.rationale: Action mandates float type for conversions referencing specific line numbers and internal fields (max_return, simulated_return_pct). This is a project implementation choice; other projects may prefer Decimal.
Action references a specific internal sentinel value 'OVERALL_SENTINEL_CODE=__overall__' unique to this project's backtest_engine. Not portable.
Action references a specific env var name 'USE_PROXY'. Other projects use different conventions. General principle is universal but the action references project-specific naming.
Temporal validation of train/test timestamps and no-future-data assertions is a universal ML-on-finance principle applicable to any project.
Rejecting future timestamps when fetching external data is a universal look-ahead bias guard applicable to any finance project.
Sell-before-buy is an implementation choice of this project's trading cycle. Other frameworks may process differently. Edge case from checklist.
Action references specific internal names 'Entity.get', '_entity_to_endpoint', and enum values (BACKTEST, HEDGE, REPORT, SCENARIO). Project-specific API boundary.
Preferring statsmodels OLS over numpy/sklearn for regression to preserve statistical inference is a universal best practice for finance regression.
Consistent filtering of bear-market periods in both numerator and denominator of information ratio is a universal statistical correctness principle.
Provider priority, credential isolation via env vars or secret manager is a universal multi-source architecture principle applicable to any finance data pipeline.
Action references specific attribute name 'IS_SAR_KEY' on project-specific vertex typology. Not portable.

Lowercase 'true'/'false' SAR flag output matches this project's schema specification. Other systems use different conventions.
